name: Live Now
description: Shows which Live TV channels are currently being watched on this server so you can tune into a warm channel instead of opening a new upstream slot.
overview: Surfaces warm Live TV channels (someone is already watching) so the household tunes into already-open upstream streams.
changelog: Self-contained release: the warm-channel name badge (🔥xN) + favorite-float now run entirely in-process inside Jellyfin (a background service via IPluginServiceRegistrator) — no external daemon, no File Transformation plugin, no config required. Favorites float instantly via IUserDataManager (fires the change event, no restart). The 'Live Now' web tab self-injects into the web client. Safety: only removes favorites it added, never a user's own; reconcile-on-startup; graceful revert on stop.
